_README: V1 Pre-registration form. Fill EVERY field BEFORE running. Then: node preregister.mjs this-file.json -> commit+push preregistrations.jsonl -> node run-v1.mjs <id>. The hidden_boundary lives ONLY here (sealed), never in the dataset file, so the operator stays blind to it in the data.
input_variable: the driver you believe explains the outcome (e.g. app_pct)
who_knows_boundary: name — the person who set the held-out boundary
who_runs_blind: name — the operator who runs the test without seeing the boundary in the data
success_criterion: breakdown on hidden_boundary.feature, threshold within tolerance, AND permutation p < p_threshold
held_out_rule: the boundary is removed from the dataset file and recorded only in this sealed form
failure_reporting: the run is recorded in v1-ledger.jsonl whether it PASSES or FAILS; failures count in attempts
decision: advance toward V2 only after >=2 distinct projects PASS under this frozen protocol
